label: KG Full (Single)
description: [EXPERIMENTAL] Full KG pipeline for text-bearing entities: extract, deduplicate, cluster, and describe. Input entities must have a 'text' property already populated — do NOT pass raw files (PDFs, images). Use a file-to-KG workflow for raw files. This workflow includes dedupe and clustering steps that are currently unreliable and may produce unpredictable results. Not recommended for production use.

input.custom_instructions: Use existing label if appropriate. Focus on creating a concise, informative description that captures the essence of the entity and its relationships.
